positive: Minimalist geometric constellation design, featuring stylized gold line art of celestial bodies (stars, planets, moon) arranged in distinct, elegant patterns. The primary composition is centered and highly symmetrical, set against a deep midnight indigo or cosmic black background. Use strong, clean silhouettes and fine, glowing golden lines for the constellation paths. Include subtle depth and variation in the star sizes, giving a premium, modern, and mystical feel. The overall look must be clean, high-contrast, and infinitely scalable for apparel printing, maintaining a clear foreground/background separation.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, text, watermarks, logos, signatures, messy, busy background, low resolution, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy
